calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235
Petitioner CARITINA LOZANO_BANUELOS was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor HERNAN TORRES LOZANO.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father JUVENAL TORRES was not present.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to HERNAN TORRES-LOZANO.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Reset To May-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Reset To Apr-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
